mainEntity.name: West Valley City job back tweak, no doctor yet, file?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report now, doctor ASAP for proof[1][2].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, but see doctor first for diagnosis linking to work.** Self-report starts, but proof needed[2]. **Key factors:** Objective findings vs. subjective pain. **Practical guidance:** Urgent care same day, get work note. Utah requires medical[1]. **Avoid 'malingering' claims.**
